title: Volerium
description: A Minecraft project recreating Europe with realistic terrain and railways, based on real-world geography at 1:25 scale.
body:
# Volerium – A Realistic Europe-Inspired Minecraft World

Volerium is a large-scale Minecraft project focused on building a world inspired by real-life Europe, with an emphasis on realistic railways, cities, and terrain. Our world is based on real geographical data and currently includes Germany and neighboring countries at a 1:10 scale, providing a highly accurate and immersive building experience.

Whether you’re passionate about trains, urban planning, or simply exploring detailed landscapes, Volerium offers a unique and collaborative environment.

Get Involved:
- Join our Discord server to get whitelisted and start building on our shared map.
- Prefer working solo? Use our tools and data to build your own custom map based on real-world coordinates.
- Access tools that convert GPS coordinates into Minecraft coordinates, making it easy to place real-life buildings or infrastructure in-game.

Start building your vision of Europe – one block at a time.

---

Include the Mod "[Dave's Building Extended](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/daves-building-extended)".
